sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt8, value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, accurateCastOrNull(10, 'Int32')), (2, accurateCastOrNull('Invalid', 'UInt8'));
UPDATE test_table SET value = accurateCastOrNull(value, 'Nullable(Int64)') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, accurateCastOrNull(value, 'String') AS string_value FROM test_table;
SELECT accurateCastOrNull(-5, 'UInt8') AS invalid_uint8, accurateCastOrNull(250, 'Int8') AS valid_int8;
